# marble.fit

> marble is a minimal workout journal for iPhone. Offline. Private. No ads.

marble tracks sets, supplements, streaks, and trends. All data stays on-device.

## Key facts

- Name: marble (App Store name: marble.fit)
- Platform: iPhone
- Price: Free
- Privacy: on-device, no account, no ads
- Offline: yes
- Category: Health & Fitness
- Developer: Lorenzo Quaid Sison

## Features

- Fast set logging
- Daily journal
- Calendar and streaks
- Weekly split planner
- Trends and records
- Supplement tracking
- Local reminders

## Links

- [Home](https://marble-fit.app/)
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/marble-fit/id6757725234)
- [Changelog](https://marble-fit.app/changelog/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/enzo-prism/marble)
- [Privacy](https://enzo-prism.github.io/marble/privacy)

## Frequently asked questions

- Free? Yes.
- Offline? Yes.
- Account? No.
- Devices? iPhone.
- Ads? No.
